features: FRAGRANCE TYPE: Elegant eau de toilette perfume for women presented in a sophisticated pink circular bottle design
VOLUME: Contains 100ml of luxurious fragrance in a beautifully crafted glass flacon with golden accents
PACKAGING: Comes in a premium pink and gold retail box, perfect for gifting or personal use
DESIGN: Features a distinctive round bottle shape with a polished gold-tone cap for an elegant presentation
PORTABILITY: Convenient 100ml size makes it ideal for daily wear whilst being perfectly sized for travel
description: Product description Discover the alluring charm of Encounter For Her, an enchanting eau de toilette that captures the essence of feminine sophistication. This delightful fragrance comes in an elegant 100ml pink bottle, featuring a luxurious gold-toned cap that adds a touch of glamour to your dressing table. The beautiful circular bottle design makes it both aesthetically pleasing and easy to hold. Perfect for daily wear or special occasions, this eau de toilette offers a delicate blend of scents that linger throughout the day. The convenient 100ml size makes it ideal for both home use and travel. The attractive packaging, complete with a coordinating pink box, makes it an excellent gift choice. From the Scent Favourites collection, this fragrance embodies contemporary elegance while maintaining a timeless appeal. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to preserve its distinctive scent. Safety Warning For External Use Only
